title: iOS ConnectIQ integration: WatchRemoteService for Garmin companion
description: Counterpart to the watch app scaffolded at ~/git/racecompass-ciq (part of the RaceCompass-9go AI coach roadmap, Tier 1/5 remote-buttons + wrist-alerts path). Embed Garmin's ConnectIQ iOS SDK in RaceCompass and add a WatchRemoteService that (1) pushes phase/ttb/ttl to the watch at ~1Hz from values CompassViewModel already publishes, (2) sends vibe alerts on threshold events, (3) handles watch->phone commands: ping (record GPS fix for nearer line end), sync_gun (sync start timer), mark (timestamped event). Message contract is frozen in racecompass-ciq/README.md — mirror keys exactly.

title: Feature Roadmap: AI Sailing Coach with Voice-First Interface
description:
25 features reranked through the lens of building toward an AI sailing coach with voice-first, eyes-up interface. Phone is the compute/sensor hub today, smart glasses tomorrow. Voice commands replace buttons (say horn instead of frequency detection).

TIER 1 - FOUNDATION (build the voice/audio layer):
1. Voice Coaching - speak coaching phases via AVSpeechSynthesizer. Entire platform pivot starts here.
2. Voice Commands - horn, tack, mark, wind replace all button presses
3. Opposite Tack Predictor - simple, immediately useful, perfect for voice (port would be 215)

TIER 2 - SMART COACHING (AI that understands your race):
4. Tack-on-Header Auto-Detection - header, consider tacking is pure coaching
5. Proximity to Layline Warning - 30 seconds to layline keeps eyes up
6. Downwind VMG Optimizer - sailing too deep, come up 5 degrees
7. Start Line Bias Calculator - pin is favored by 8 degrees
8. Gate Rounding Selector - take the left gate, puts you on the favored tack

TIER 3 - LEARNING ENGINE (AI that knows your boat):
9. Drift Detection - compare COG vs heading, average across tacks to cancel leeway. Voice: current setting you right, favor the left
10. Wind Shift Detection - persistent left shift building
11. Tack Efficiency Score - good tack, 4 seconds to recover as post-tack feedback
12. Acceleration Profile Library - record real curves to self-calibrate time-to-burn
13. Heel-to-Speed Correlation - flatten out, you are fast at 12 degrees today

TIER 4 - POST-RACE INTELLIGENCE (AI that teaches you):
14. Post-Race Replay and Analysis - log GPS/heading/heel/coaching, replay on map
15. Leg Performance Comparison - compare VMG/speed/heel across repeated legs
16. Windward Mark Rounding Analyzer - measure arc, speed loss, time through roundings
17. Sailing Polars Builder - build actual polar diagrams from your boat data over time
18. Venue Learning Heat Map - aggregate drift, shifts, tracks across races at same venue
19. Favored Side Predictor - combine shifts with GPS history for geographic wind patterns

TIER 5 - PLATFORM FEATURES (enhance the experience):
20. Start Line Distance Haptics - progressive haptic pulses approaching the line
21. Penalty Turn Timer - detect 720/360 spin from heading, confirm completion
22. Start Line Sag Detection - track distance-to-line at gun, coach aggression
23. Wave State from Gyro - derive wave period and sea state from 20Hz IMU
24. Crew Call Audio Log - tap to mark timestamped events, sync with GPS track
25. Fleet Replay via Shared Tracks - overlay multiple users post-race for debrief
